issue: Skill points to non-canonical and missing CLAUDE.md anchors
proposed_change: Replace CLAUDE.md references with AGENTS.md and canonical index links RE-INDEX.md, LORE-INDEX.md, ROADMAP-INDEX.md

issue: Kill-counter example uses aligned-view offset framing as authoritative
proposed_change: Update example to true-view mapping: file 0x23F6 for kills with CCareer 0x23F4 and mark aligned-view references as legacy only

issue: Load path write to defaultoptions.bea is stated as unconditional
proposed_change: Revise wording to conditional load-path write on DAT_0082b5b0 == 0 and note other save/menu flows can also rewrite defaultoptions.bea

issue: CCareer__Load summaries omit options entries and tail semantics for flag modes
proposed_change: Replace summaries with explicit behavior for flag=0 vs flag!=0 covering sound/music and options entries/tail apply semantics

issue: Roadmap still says Python Binary Patches parity is pending
proposed_change: Update status block to implemented parity and shift focus text to UX polish, reliability hardening, and regression depth

issue: Python CLI lacks --version while C# CLI supports it
proposed_change: Add --version option in Python CLI with matching success exit behavior and version text contract

issue: Save Analyzer summary duplicates Options section in Python
proposed_change: Remove duplicate Options block and keep a single deterministic options section in summary generation

issue: No read-only CLI parity tests for --analyze, --compare, and --dump-mystery
proposed_change: Add cross-stack read-only mode tests covering success and failure paths with stable marker assertions

issue: Options-file safety guard and override behavior are untested
proposed_change: Add tests for blocked-by-default behavior and --allow-career-sections-on-options-file override success in both stacks

issue: C# binary patch verify/apply/restore semantics are not regression-tested
proposed_change: Add C# regression suite for mismatch abort, backup creation rules, apply/restore success, and cross-stack patch-spec parity

issue: Validation gate docs omit active Python binary patch regression module
proposed_change: Add tests_pyqt/test_binary_patches_unittest.py to required Python gate command sequences

issue: Top-level canonical index guidance is optional and incomplete
proposed_change: Update skill text to mandate RE-INDEX.md, LORE-INDEX.md, and ROADMAP-INDEX.md as canonical top-level indexes

issue: Skill README policy conflicts with repo compatibility stance
proposed_change: Revise policy to _index.md canonical with folder README allowed for compatibility if kept synchronized
